hypotheses.title: value-accounting invariant review for IndexingAgreement.sol
hypotheses.hypothesis: Deposits, withdrawals, shares, rewards, or claims can drift from contract balance or protocol accounting after an edge-case sequence.
hypotheses.local_test_idea: Run a local invariant over deposit/withdraw/claim/cancel sequences and assert conservation after every step.
hypotheses.rejection_rule: Reject if a local test shows the invariant is already enforced or the behavior maps only to self-approved/user-error conditions.

safety_note: Hypotheses are untrusted until local PoC or invariant evidence proves them.
